info.title: Newledge Backend
info.description: Newledge Backend API with Google OAuth and PostgreSQL

get.description:
Get current user's profile information.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    
Returns:
    UserProfileResponse containing user profile in standard format

Get a track by UUID for the authenticated user.

Args:
    uuid: UUID of the track to retrieve
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    
Returns:
    TrackFullResponseModel containing track information

parameters.name: uuid

schema.description: UUID of the track to retrieve
schema.title: Uuid

parameters.description: UUID of the track to retrieve

post.description:
Create a new track for the authenticated user.

Args:
    track_data: Track creation data
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    session: Database session
    
Returns:
    TrackBasicResponseModel containing created track information

put.description:
Update a track by UUID for the authenticated user.

Args:
    uuid: UUID of the track to update
    track_data: Track update data
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    session: Database session
    
Returns:
    TrackBasicResponseModel containing updated track information

delete.description:
Delete a track by UUID for the authenticated user.

Args:
    track_data: Track delete data
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    session: Database session
    
Returns:
    TrackBasicResponseModel confirming deletion

get.description:
Get a list of all track domains.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    TrackDomainListResponse containing list of track domains

Get a list of all track sources.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    TrackSourceListResponse containing list of track sources

OAuthCodeModel.title: OAuthCodeModel
OAuthCodeModel.description: Used for callback from third-party OAuth.

TrackBasicResponseModel.title: TrackBasicResponseModel
TrackBasicResponseModel.description: Response model for a basic track.

TrackCreateModel.description: Request model for creating a track.

TrackDomainResponseModel.title: TrackDomainResponseModel
TrackDomainResponseModel.description: Response model for a track domain.

TrackFullResponseModel.title: TrackFullResponseModel
TrackFullResponseModel.description: Response model for a track with all properties.

TrackIdentifyModel.title: TrackIdentifyModel
TrackIdentifyModel.description: Request model for finding a track.

TrackSourceResponseModel.title: TrackSourceResponseModel
TrackSourceResponseModel.description: Response model for a track source.

TrackUpdateModel.title: TrackUpdateModel
TrackUpdateModel.description: Request model for updating a track.

UserFullResponseModel.title: UserFullResponseModel
UserFullResponseModel.description: Response model for a full user.
